long_form.title: Global Causes of Death vs. News Coverage: A Shocking Disconnect (1990-2019)
long_form.description:
This video dramatically reveals the vast difference between the actual leading causes of death globally and the amount of attention they receive in the news. Explore a full dataset visualization to uncover surprising biases in public perception and media priorities, highlighting long-term trends and overlooked health crises. Discover what truly kills us versus what dominates headlines.
Data source: Our World in Data

short.title: Nobody Saw This Coming: Alzheimer's & Overdoses Explode (1999-2016) #Shorts
short.description: In just 17 years (1999-2016), Alzheimer's Disease jumped from #8 to #5, and drug overdose deaths surged by 344%. This short reveals the shocking rise of these silent killers that the news largely missed.
